case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. BERNALDO A DONADO PEREZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, BERNALDO A DONADO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
STIPULATION TO ALLOW JUDGE PRO TEM TO HEAR CASE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARLEN RAMOS, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT BERNALDO A DONADO PEREZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
